title: Earth Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:6a12923d073639615a6e1ac30b97265e.gif|right|300px]]


==Summary==
The power to '''manipulate elements derived from earth (rock, metal, etc.)'''. The user can create, shape and manipulate earth and "Earthen" elements including most solid objects, specifically all [[wikipedia:Mineral|minerals]] and mineral compositions regardless of their state (mountain, boulder, sand or dust), dirt, [[wikipedia:Soil|soil]], etc.

==Possible Uses==
*Move all solid objects like rocks, boulders, and stones at nearly any speed
*Dig
*Prevent or assist plants growing
*Create earthquakes, avalanches, mudslides, or quicksand
*Move dirt beneath target to fly or run quickly
*Dirt or rock shields
*Erupt Volcanoes
*Control lava/magma
*Cover user's hands in a solid material, making punches hit harder
*Break mountains or boulders
*Some can control sand
*Some can control salt or sugar (rock salt) since the minerals are found in rocks and plants
*Ride boulders for travel
*Some can control metal
*In an earthen area, one's earth power is nearly invincible
*Stone/Rock Mimicry
*Users can regenerate when buried under earth to heal wounds and essentially "recharging" energy

==Limitations==
*May be unable to create earth, being limited to manipulating only from already existing sources.
*Distance, mass, precision, etc. depend upon of the knowledge, skill, and strength of the user.
*May have to be/stay in contact with earth.
*Glass and Artifical Solids may be hard or impossible to control.
*Geokinetic Immunity
*May not be able to control over extraterrestrial (Alien) elements.
*May be weak against [[Electricity Manipulation]], as electricity can travel through the ground and break apart the earth.

==Users==
* [[Gaara]] ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
* [[Toph Beifong]] ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender]])
* [[Groudon]] ([[Pokémon]])
* [[Yoshi]] ([[Mario Bros]])
* [[Gaea (Percy Jackson)|Gaea]] ([[Riordanverse|Percy Jackson]])
